hooks.command: sh -c 'rebase_dir=$(git rev-parse --git-path rebase-merge 2>/dev/null || printf %s .git/rebase-merge); merge_head=$(git rev-parse --git-path MERGE_HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf %s .git/MERGE_HEAD); if [ -d "$rebase_dir" ] || [ -f "$merge_head" ] || [ -e .hook-paused ]; then exit 0; fi; git add -A && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto-commit by worker worker-2 at $(date -Iseconds)")'
